ADR-005.title: Chunked upload protocol: TUS
ADR-005.decision: @tus/server on Fastify (mounted under /api/upload), tus-js-client on the frontend. Bridge to MinIO via S3 multipart on chunk completion.
ADR-005.current_code_state: TUS REMOVED 2026-05-19 per changelog; api/src/routes/upload-init.ts + upload-complete.ts use direct S3 presigned multipart; no api/src/plugins/tus.ts exists.
ADR-005.drift_severity: P0 — graph ADR contradicts shipped code

ADR-004.title: Object Storage: MinIO (S3-compatible)
ADR-004.decision: MinIO 2026 in Docker Compose. AWS SDK v3 S3 client used in code so swap to AWS S3 / Cloudflare R2 is a config change only.
ADR-004.current_code_state: Production uses Cloud.ru S3 (transcrib-itsalt-prod bucket) per changelog/TECH-016; dev uses MinIO. Provider-swap is consistent with ADR-004, no drift on the decision itself.

ADR-007.title: kie.ai (Claude Sonnet 4.6 / GPT-5.4)
ADR-007.current_code_state: worker/src/llm/kieai.ts. ENDPOINT DRIFT: changelog 1f025b7 'fix(UC-300): switch kie.ai client to Anthropic /claude/v1/messages' — endpoint change; ADR-007 text already names this endpoint, but the FIX category was L1 (code-only) while changing an external wire envelope shape is L2/L3 (spec-first prerequisite would apply).

ADR-010.title: Realtime status: Server-Sent Events
ADR-010.recent_fix: 7f983f6 fix(TECH-012): emit SSE event:<type> so client listeners actually fire — L1 fix, no spec change required by gate (TECH-012 not in graph)

tasks_in_graph_vs_status_json_drift.graph_task_total_excludes: Graph holds TECH-001..TECH-015 + per-UC TECH-side BE/FE splits (UC-001-BE etc.). status.json adds TECH-016..TECH-024 (9 deployment tasks) which DO NOT EXIST as Task nodes in the live graph. status.json also exposes UCs at top level (without BE/FE split). conductor-state lists only TECH-001..TECH-015 in techTasks[] and shows phase: delivered.

W7..W10 deployment waves from status.json do not exist as Wave nodes in graph at all (W6 also absent — numbering skips).
